hero.subtitle: Designed in Québec for Canadian roads, four seasons, and those who never stop.

statement.desc: Every Compano bike is built with meticulous precision — for those who never settle for second best.

features.title:
Every detail
matters.
features.item1_desc: Geometry engineered for Canadian roads. Optimal rigidity with winter shock absorption.
features.item2_desc: Direct traction, constant torque. Built for steep Canadian hills and long distances.
features.item3_desc: High-density cells, fast charging. Up to 140 km range in assist mode.
features.item4_desc: Cadence + Torque. Assistance adapts in real time to your effort — natural and precise.

footerCta.title:
Order your
COMPANO
footerCta.subtitle: Choose your Compano. Designed for you, built to last.

modelDetails.fz3_strong: The Compano FZ3+ features a powerful 500W rear hub motor delivering 60Nm of torque. Its 36V 20Ah (720Wh) battery provides up to 140 km of range in pedal-assist mode* or 50 km using the throttle. Now with both cadence and torque sensors — a true 2-in-1 e-bike.
modelDetails.fz3_normal: Designed by Canadians for the needs of Canadian riders and bike paths. The FZ3+ frame engineering lets you step through with ease, while maintaining excellent rigidity for a perfect blend of comfort, performance, and stability.
modelDetails.fz2_strong: The Compano FZ2+ features a powerful 500W rear hub motor delivering 60Nm of torque. Its 36V 13Ah (468Wh) battery provides up to 90 km of range in pedal-assist mode* or 50 km using the throttle. Now with both cadence and torque sensors — a true 2-in-1 e-bike.
modelDetails.fz2_normal: Designed by Canadians for the needs of Canadian riders and bike paths. The FZ2+ frame engineering lets you step through with ease, while maintaining excellent rigidity for a perfect blend of comfort, performance, and stability.
modelDetails.se2_strong: With its battery fully integrated into the frame, the Compano SE2 stands apart from other e-bikes. Its lightweight build gives you the same agile, sporty ride as a regular bike — with all the benefits of electric assist. High-quality battery cells enable ultra-fast charging, making it the perfect companion for urban rides and errands.
modelDetails.rx1_strong: With its high-capacity battery integrated into the frame and removable from the top, the Compano RX1+ stands apart. Equipped with a 500W motor delivering 60Nm of torque and a 48V 15Ah (720Wh) battery, it's the ideal choice for those who need long range or serious power to tackle the steepest hills.
modelDetails.rx1_normal: Designed by Canadians for the needs of Canadian riders and bike paths. The RX1+ frame engineering lets you step through with ease, while maintaining excellent rigidity for a perfect blend of comfort, performance, and stability.

about.title:
Built for
this land.
Your land.
about.p1: Too many e-bikes are built to the lowest common denominator. Compano was founded in 2019 with one mission: [[strong]] — not adapted from Europe or Asia.
about.p2: Canadian law allows powerful motors and a throttle lever. We chose the [[strong]] for its consistent power, reduced chain wear, and ease of maintenance through winter.

items.title: Bike parts
items.desc: Drivetrain, wheels, accessories: covered 1 year against manufacturing defects from date of purchase.

items.title: Electrical system
items.desc: Battery, motor, display, wiring, and controller — 2 years of full coverage.

items.title: Frame
items.desc: Compano frames carry a 3-year warranty against any manufacturing defect.

Test ride a Compano
near you.
dealers.subtitle: Our certified dealer network across Québec and Canada.

footer.tagline: Electric bikes built for Canadian riders. Designed in Québec since 2019.

models.title:
Four bikes.
One for you.
models.subtitle: Every Compano is designed in Québec, Canada-compliant, and built for your four seasons.
models.motor_subtitle: A deliberate technical choice for the Canadian climate.

motor_reasons.title: Consistent power
motor_reasons.desc: The rear hub motor delivers direct, steady traction without torque variation based on cadence.

motor_reasons.title: Reduced chain wear
motor_reasons.desc: Without a motorized bottom bracket, the chain lasts much longer — critical for salted winter roads.

motor_reasons.title: Throttle lever
motor_reasons.desc: Canadian law allows a throttle lever. Our rear motor is optimized for this riding mode.

motor_reasons.title: Easy maintenance
motor_reasons.desc: No special tools required. Any bike shop can service your Compano.

about.hero_title:
Born in Québec.
Built for Canada.
about.philosophy_text: Compano is not an adaptation of a European or Asian model. Every technical decision was made with Québec roads, harsh winters, and Canadian law in mind — law that allows powerful motors and throttle levers.

milestones.text: Compano founded — first prototype built in Montréal.
Commercial launch of the first FZ2+ and FZ3+ models.
Launch of the SE2 integrated-battery and RX1+ 48V models.

about.hero_subtitle: Founded in 2019 in Montréal — built for Canadian roads, winters, and regulations.
about.origins_text: Compano was founded in 2019. With the team's deep expertise in electric bikes, motors, and batteries, the company set out to offer a Québec-designed e-bike with cutting-edge technology — a product tailored for the needs, regulations, and reality of Québec and Canada.
about.motor_text1: It was very important to our team to offer a product that wasn't a compromise between the needs of different countries — but a product truly built for Canada.
about.motor_text2: Canadian law allows powerful motors and a throttle lever. For this reason, the rear hub motor was chosen. A rear hub motor with enough power (350W+) offers major advantages: consistent power regardless of gear selection, a throttle lever, reduced chain wear, easier maintenance, and more.
about.motor_text3: Compano electric bikes were developed for and by Canadians in Québec.

vaa.title:
Protected by
Velec.
vaa.subtitle: The Velec VAA program covers your Compano well beyond the manufacturer warranty.
vaa.what_text: The Velec VAA program is supplemental coverage for your Compano e-bike. It protects your investment against out-of-warranty breakdowns, theft, and accidental damage.

benefits.title: Extended coverage
benefits.desc: Parts and labour coverage beyond the manufacturer warranty.

benefits.title: Theft protection
benefits.desc: Reimbursement if your Compano is stolen.

benefits.title: Accidental damage
benefits.desc: Coverage for damage from a fall or collision.

benefits.title: Velec network
benefits.desc: Service across the entire Velec dealer network in Canada.

product.range_note: Maximum recommended rider weight: 270 lbs. *The range calculation is based on a 180 lbs cyclist, at assist level 2, at a speed of 20 km/h on flat ground.
product.fz2_desc1: The Compano FZ2+ is equipped with a powerful 500W rear-wheel motor, delivering 60Nm of torque. Its 36V 13Ah (468Wh) battery provides a range of 90 km in pedal-assist mode* or 38 km with the throttle. Now featuring a cadence sensor and a torque sensor, it's a 2-in-1 bike.
product.fz2_desc2:
It's designed by Canadians to meet the needs of people and local bike paths. Its battery, located behind the seat post, allows for optimal weight distribution, a low center of gravity, and ample frame clearance for easy mounting.

It is equipped with wide tires specifically designed for electric bikes to prevent punctures, a large central console with 5 levels of assistance, a rear rack, mudguards, an ultra-sturdy kickstand, a comfortable saddle, and front and rear lights. The hydraulic disc brake system provides powerful stopping power, the levers are equipped with a motor cut-off switch, and the rear light is integrated with the braking system to provide a brake light and ensure maximum safety.
product.fz3_desc1: The Compano FZ3+ is equipped with a powerful 500W rear-wheel motor, delivering 60Nm of torque. Its 36V 20Ah (720Wh) battery provides a range of 140 km in pedal-assist mode* or 50 km with the throttle. Now featuring a cadence sensor and a torque sensor, it's a 2-in-1 bike.
product.fz3_desc2:
It's designed by Canadians to meet the needs of people and local bike paths. Its battery, located behind the seat post, allows for optimal weight distribution, a low center of gravity, and ample frame clearance for easy mounting.

It is equipped with wide tires specifically designed for electric bikes to prevent punctures, a large central console with 5 levels of assistance, a rear rack, mudguards, an ultra-sturdy kickstand, a comfortable saddle, and front and rear lights. The hydraulic disc brake system provides powerful stopping power, the levers are equipped with a motor cut-off switch, and the rear light is integrated with the braking system to provide a brake light and ensure maximum safety.
product.se2_desc1: With its battery fully integrated into the frame, the Compano SE2 stands apart from other e-bikes. Its lightweight build gives you the same agile, sporty ride as a regular bike — with all the benefits of electric assist.
product.se2_desc2: High-quality battery cells enable ultra-fast charging, making it the perfect companion for urban rides and daily errands. Invisible battery, clean design — the SE2 is the e-bike for those who don't want to look like they're riding an e-bike.
product.rx1_desc1: With its high-capacity battery integrated into the frame and removable from the top, the Compano RX1+ stands apart. Equipped with a 500W motor delivering 60Nm of torque and a 48V 15Ah (720Wh) battery, it's the ideal choice for those who need long range or serious power to tackle the steepest hills.
product.rx1_desc2: Designed by Canadians for Québec roads. The RX1+ frame engineering ensures easy step-through access while maintaining excellent rigidity for a perfect blend of comfort, performance, and stability.
